title: cousinia wolgensis
intro: Cousinia wolgensis, also known as Wolgograd bitter-weed, is a perennial plant in the daisy family native to Eastern Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cousinia wolgensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cousinia wolgensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
